Hey,

Could you take a look at PR #847 today? It's blocking the Friday release.

Sarah

subject: Re: Q2 hiring plan — your call?
snippet: Following up — need your input on the 3 senior eng roles by EOW.
body:
Hey,

Following up on my message from last Tuesday — I need your sign-off on the Q2 hiring plan, specifically the 3 senior eng roles. Finance is asking. Could we get this locked by end of week?

Thanks,
Arjun

Hi,

Maya

subject: AWS cost anomaly: us-east-1 spend up 47% week-over-week
snippet: Spike detected in EC2 NAT Gateway costs.
body:
AWS Cost Anomaly Detection

Detected anomaly:
Service: EC2 - NAT Gateway
Region: us-east-1
Week-over-week: +47% (USD 312 → USD 458)
Likely cause: Increased data transfer from new staging VPC

Review in Cost Explorer: https://console.aws.amazon.com/cost-management

subject: Critical security advisory — lodash CVE-2026-1234
snippet: Lodash 4.17.20 affected. 3 of your repos use it.
body:
GitHub Security

A critical advisory was published for lodash (CVE-2026-1234, CVSS 9.8).
Affected versions: < 4.17.21

Your repositories using affected versions:
- checkexcel/api (lodash@4.17.20)
- checkexcel/web (lodash@4.17.19)
- internal/dashboards (lodash@4.17.20)

Dependabot has opened PRs to patch.

subject: [CheckExcel] Cannot import .xlsx with merged cells
snippet: User Maria reports import fails on merged cells.
body:
From: Maria Tan <maria@acme.com>

Hi team,

I tried to import our Q1 sales sheet into CheckExcel and it errors out with 'cannot parse merged cells'. We use merged cells extensively for headers.

Is there a workaround?

Maria

subject: URGENT: Production outage on our integration since Tuesday
snippet: Webhook deliveries failing. Considering pausing the contract.
body:
Team,

Our production integration has been broken since Tuesday morning. Webhook deliveries failing with 503s. We've raised 4 support tickets with no response.

If this isn't resolved by EOD tomorrow, we'll need to pause the contract.

Escalating directly to you.

— Daniel Lim, Head of Eng @ BigCustomer
